--sysroot=/Users/dev/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/sysroot -fPIC -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -march=armv7-a -mthumb -Wformat -Werror=format-security   -Os -DNDEBUG -shared -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-rosegment -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments  -Wl,--gc-sections  -Wl,--exclude-libs,ALL -Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384 -Wl,--gc-sections -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AwesomeVideoKit.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libAwesomeVideoKit.so -o libAwesomeVideoKit.so
